hero.headline: Your business works while you sleep
hero.subheadline: Orquesta connects channels, automates conversations and operates 24/7. No code. No friction.

stages.label: The foundations
stages.heading:
Everything starts
with an empty room
stages.body: Before automating you need infrastructure. We build it from scratch.

stages.label: Order channel
stages.heading:
Mi Mostrador
enters the stage
stages.body: The platform receives orders from WhatsApp, web and delivery. No calls. No paper.

stages.label: Web support
stages.heading:
A bot that
never rests
stages.body: Responds instantly, qualifies leads and escalates to humans only when needed.

stages.label: Smart voice
stages.heading:
Calls that
manage themselves
stages.body: Outbound for campaigns and collections. Inbound for routing and scheduling.

stages.label: Appointment management
stages.heading:
The calendar
that runs itself
stages.body: Bookings via WhatsApp or voice. Automatic confirmation, reminder and cancellation.

stages.label: System active
stages.heading:
Your room
is operational
stages.body: All channels connected to the Orquesta core. The system works. You supervise.

gallery.heading:
The protagonists
of your room
gallery.subheading: Click a frame to explore the service.

mostrador.name: Mi Mostrador
mostrador.description: The order and delivery platform for food service and retail businesses. Digital menu, payments, real-time tracking.

bots.name: Web bots
bots.description: An AI agent embedded in your website that answers questions, qualifies leads and escalates to humans when needed.

llamadas.name: Outbound calls
llamadas.tagline: Scale your sales force without hiring
llamadas.description: Automated AI calling campaigns. Reminders, collections, surveys and follow-ups without operators.

recepcion.name: Call reception
recepcion.description: An AI receptionist that answers, classifies and routes incoming calls to the right area or books an appointment.

turnos.name: Appointment management
turnos.description: Your client books via WhatsApp or voice, the system confirms, reminds and cancels. No human intervention.

cta.heading:
Your business never sleeps.
Now you can.
cta.subheading: Get started in 48 hours. No long contracts. No internal IT.
